fields.name: company
fields.description: agency or company name (the listing title)

fields.name: profile_link
fields.description: the URL of this company's profile page ON THIS DIRECTORY (e.g. a clutch.co/profile/... or goodfirms.co/company/... link), NOT the company's own website

fields.name: rating
fields.description: review star rating shown for this company, e.g. 4.9 (leave blank if none)

fields.name: reviews
fields.description: number of reviews / ratings count shown, digits only, e.g. 52 (leave blank if none)

fields.name: budget_range
fields.description: minimum project size or budget shown, e.g. '$5,000+' or '$1,000+' (leave blank if none)

fields.name: category
fields.description: the service category / industry / what they do, e.g. 'Digital Marketing', 'AI Development'

fields.name: location
fields.description: city and state/country shown for the company, e.g. 'New York, NY'

fields.name: note
fields.description: the short tagline or description blurb shown for this company on the listing

fields.name: website
fields.description: the destination URL of THIS company's 'Visit Website' button/link. It is often a directory redirect or tracking link (e.g. 'r.clutch.co/redirect?...&provider_website=...', or an external link carrying utm_ parameters) -- capture the FULL href exactly as it appears, do not shorten or clean it. Leave blank only if this company genuinely has no visit-website link.
